firmware.title: DE2117_11_C.34 is available
firmware.description:
New version: DE2117_11_C.34

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to October, 2024

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 2 AM and 6 AM starting November 3rd, 2024. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.
